TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gaga meniq prading eluw kesun soriawcusyen na patongkwang kutaw hiya. Kari plngagan kndalax Kangsi "scyenwkong " Fkangan , qsiya nii ka nmahan supi na, meyah pkhedu pseesu mkuni ka Ringswanwun sucen . Qbsuran supi telu Cin Ukuwagliyan ka pgela meyah "kaysan fufan" smalu elu patonkwan kutaw ciida, cheya bale mahun ka qsiya kiya mesa, kiya kesun daha "Kancyencin ". Wada sliqan mrunu 921ciida, anisi klaun daha niqan so malu mahun ma niqan ka dungus na kndalax cubeyo duri, kiya ka daan daha smalu bleyaq gnbgurah dungan. .
S.PHON: gaga m…ôniq p…ĺadiŇč …ôluw k…ôsun so…ĺiaw ¶usj…ôn na patoŇčkwaŇč kutaw ńßija. ka…ĺi plŇčagan kndalax kaŇčsi "s ¶j…ônwkoŇč " *kaŇčan , qsija nii ka nmańßan supi na, m…ôańß pkńß…ôdu ps…ô…ôsu mkuni ka …ĺiŇčswanwun su ¶…ôn . qbsu…ĺan supi t…ôlu ¶in ukuwaglijan ka pg…ôla m…ôańß "kajsan *u*an" smalu …ôlu patonkwan kutaw ¶iida, ¶ńß…ôa bal…ô mańßun ka qsija kija m…ôsa, kija k…ôsun dańßa "kan ¶j…ôn ¶in ". wada sliqan m…ĺunu *** ¶iida, anisi klaun dańßa niqan so malu mańßun ma niqan ka duŇčus na kndalax ¶ub…ôo du…ĺi, kija ka daan dańßa smalu bl…ôaq gnbgu…ĺańß duŇčan. .
S.FORM: Gaga meniq prading eluw kesun soriawcusyen na patongkwang kutaw hiya. Kari plngagan kndalax Kangsi "scyenwkong " Fkangan , qsiya nii ka nmahan supi na, meyah pkhedu pseesu mkuni ka Ringswanwun sucen . Qbsuran supi telu Cin Ukuwagliyan ka pgela meyah "kaysan fufan" smalu elu patonkwan kutaw ciida, cheya bale mahun ka qsiya kiya mesa, kiya kesun daha "Kancyencin ". Wada sliqan mrunu 921ciida, anisi klaun daha niqan so malu mahun ma niqan ka dungus na kndalax cubeyo duri, kiya ka daan daha smalu bleyaq gnbgurah dungan. .
